indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: No stove, oven, or microwave is visible, making it impossible to cook in this space.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: absence of hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present, which is required for all food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: absence of storage space
indicators.rationale: No cabinets or shelves are visible, which would be necessary for storing ingredients and kitchen tools.

indicators.name: absence of seating
indicators.rationale: No chairs or tables are present, which would be needed for preparing and serving meals.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking. There are no cooking appliances, no water access, no hard prep surfaces, no storage space, and no seating. The space is designed for entertainment and presentation, not for cooking.
